message:
fix(bulkhead): suppress clippy significant_drop_tightening on saturation test

The enqueue_deadline_saturates_for_large_timeout test holds a
BulkheadPermit (_p) for its entire scope to exhaust capacity, which
is intentional. Allow clippy::significant_drop_tightening to silence
the false positive about tightening the drop scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
